title: Directory
subtitle: Organizations, people, and the positions that connect them. Every change flows through the approval queue before it appears publicly.

organizations.title: Organizations
organizations.subtitle: The org tree — AU, main organs, departments, offices, and units.
organizations.emptyDescription: Submit the first organization to populate the tree.
organizations.newSubtitle: Submit a new organization for review.
organizations.editSubtitle: Your edit will go to the approval queue before becoming public.
organizations.deleteDescription: The organization will be soft-deleted after the change is approved. Children must be reparented first.
organizations.deleteBlockedChildren_one: Cannot delete — {{count}} child organization must be reparented first.
organizations.deleteBlockedChildren_other: Cannot delete — {{count}} child organizations must be reparented first.

fields.name: Name
fields.namePlaceholder: e.g. Department of Infrastructure and Energy

tree.title: Organization tree
tree.subtitle: Read-only view of the current published hierarchy. Use the list view to submit changes.
tree.subtitleManager: Drag any organization onto another to reparent. Moves are applied immediately and recorded in the approval history.

people.title: People
people.subtitle: Individuals who hold positions across the Union.
people.emptyDescription: Submit the first person record to populate the directory.
people.newSubtitle: Submit a new person for review.
people.editSubtitle: Your edit will go to the approval queue before becoming public.
people.deleteDescription: The person record will be soft-deleted after approval. End their current assignments first.
people.deleteBlockedAssignments_one: Cannot delete — {{count}} current assignment must be ended first.
people.deleteBlockedAssignments_other: Cannot delete — {{count}} current assignments must be ended first.

cards.initialAssignmentHelp: Optionally associate a position. The assignment is created together with the person — no separate approval cycle.

positions.title: Positions
positions.subtitle: Formal posts inside an organization — who reports to whom and who currently holds them.
positions.emptyDescription: Submit the first position to populate the directory.
positions.newSubtitle: Submit a new position for review.
positions.editSubtitle: Your edit will go to the approval queue before becoming public.
positions.deleteDescription: The position will be soft-deleted after approval. End the current assignment first.
positions.deleteBlockedAssignments_one: Cannot delete — {{count}} current assignment must be ended first.
positions.deleteBlockedAssignments_other: Cannot delete — {{count}} current assignments must be ended first.

assignments.assignToPositionSubtitle: Create a new assignment for this person. The position's current holder (if any) will be closed on approval.
assignments.assignSubtitle: Create a new assignment. The current holder (if any) will be closed on approval.
assignments.endSubtitle: Set the end date and optional notes. The position becomes vacant after approval.

changes.title: Approvals queue
changes.subtitle: Review and publish directory changes submitted by focal persons.
changes.mineSubtitle: Track your pending, approved, rejected, and withdrawn change requests.
changes.historySubtitle: Every approved, rejected, and withdrawn change request in this tenant.
changes.searchPlaceholder: Search submitter, reviewer, or record ID…
changes.emptyPendingDescription: Focal persons' submissions will appear here for review.
changes.emptyMine: You haven't submitted any changes yet.
changes.emptyMineDescription: When you edit a record, your submission will appear here.
changes.emptyHistoryDescription: Approved, rejected, and withdrawn submissions will appear here.
changes.detailSubtitle: Review the proposed change before approving or rejecting.

approveDialog.title: Approve this change?
approveDialog.description: The change will be applied immediately and appear on the public directory if this tenant contributes to it.

rejectDialog.title: Reject this change?
rejectDialog.description: The submitter will be notified. A reason is required.

withdrawDialog.title: Withdraw this submission?
withdrawDialog.description: Only you can withdraw your own pending submissions.

submission.updatedSubmittedForReview: Your edit was submitted for review
submission.deletedSubmittedForReview: Your delete request was submitted for review
